message:
🐛 fix: CTA button text truncation on smaller screens (#8421)

Bump the full-text breakpoint from lg (1024px) to xl (1280px) so the
long "Want your own local KubeStellar Console?" / "How to connect
agent" text only renders when there is enough horizontal room.  Add
whitespace-nowrap to prevent mid-word line breaks inside the pill
button.  Below xl the short labels ("Get Console" / "Connect") are
shown instead.

Fixes #8409

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch: @@ -381,19 +381,19 @@ export function Layout({ children: _children }: LayoutProps) { variant="accent" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowSetupDialog(true)} - className="hidden sm:flex ml-2 rounded-full" + className="hidden sm:flex ml-2 rounded-full whitespace-nowrap" > {isAuthenticatedNoAgent ? ( <> - {t('layout.howToConnectAgent')} - {t('layout.connect')} + {t('layout.howToConnectAgent')} + {t('layout.connect')} ) : ( <> - {t('layout.wantYourOwnConsole')} - {t('layout.getConsole')} + {t('layout.wantYourOwnConsole')} + {t('layout.getConsole')} )}
